privileged_info_summary: Case 0002 is a verified real case from the VitalDB open dataset, collected at Seoul National University Hospital. It documents a 54-year-old male patient undergoing subtotal gastrectomy for advanced gastric cancer under general anesthesia via open approach in supine position. The surgical data was recorded using Vital Recorder version 1.16.6 and includes high-resolution waveforms from multiple anesthesia monitoring devices (Primus, Orchestra, Solar 8000M, BIS monitor). This is non-cardiac surgery (general surgery for gastric cancer), representing a typical perioperative case from the VitalDB dataset of 6,388 noncardiac surgeries collected at Seoul National University Hospital.
